'''modhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keld|keld]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keld|keld]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modhajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhajithi|modhajithi]] || [[word:modhajiji|modhajiji]] || [[word:modhajishi|modhajishi]] || [[word:modhajiki|modhajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhajuthuthu|modhajuthuthu]] || [[word:modhajujuju|modhajujuju]] || [[word:modhajushushu|modhajushushu]] || [[word:modhajukuku|modhajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhajuthu|modhajuthu]] || [[word:modhajuju|modhajuju]] || [[word:modhajushu|modhajushu]] || [[word:modhajuku|modhajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhajufthuf|modhajufthuf]] || [[word:modhajufjuf|modhajufjuf]] || [[word:modhajufshuf|modhajufshuf]] || [[word:modhajufkuf|modhajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhajethe|modhajethe]] || [[word:modhajeje|modhajeje]] || [[word:modhajeshe|modhajeshe]] || [[word:modhajeke|modhajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhajothotho|modhajothotho]] || [[word:modhajojojo|modhajojojo]] || [[word:modhajoshosho|modhajoshosho]] || [[word:modhajokoko|modhajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhajotho|modhajotho]] || [[word:modhajojo|modhajojo]] || [[word:modhajosho|modhajosho]] || [[word:modhajoko|modhajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhajofthof|modhajofthof]] || [[word:modhajofjof|modhajofjof]] || [[word:modhajofshof|modhajofshof]] || [[word:modhajofkof|modhajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhajïfthïf|modhajïfthïf]] || [[word:modhajïfjïf|modhajïfjïf]] || [[word:modhajïfshïf|modhajïfshïf]] || [[word:modhajïfkïf|modhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhajïfthïfthïf|modhajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:modhajïfjïfjïf|modhajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:modhajïfshïfshïf|modhajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:modhajïfkïfkïf|modhajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhajïfthïf|modhajïfthïf]] || [[word:modhajïfjïf|modhajïfjïf]] || [[word:modhajïfshïf|modhajïfshïf]] || [[word:modhajïfkïf|modhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhajïfthïf|modhajïfthïf]] || [[word:modhajïfjïf|modhajïfjïf]] || [[word:modhajïfshïf|modhajïfshïf]] || [[word:modhajïfkïf|modhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhajæthæ|modhajæthæ]] || [[word:modhajæjæ|modhajæjæ]] || [[word:modhajæshæ|modhajæshæ]] || [[word:modhajækæ|modhajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhajathatha|modhajathatha]] || [[word:modhajajaja|modhajajaja]] || [[word:modhajashasha|modhajashasha]] || [[word:modhajakaka|modhajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhajatha|modhajatha]] || [[word:modhajaja|modhajaja]] || [[word:modhajasha|modhajasha]] || [[word:modhajaka|modhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhajafthaf|modhajafthaf]] || [[word:modhajafjaf|modhajafjaf]] || [[word:modhajafshaf|modhajafshaf]] || [[word:modhajafkaf|modhajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modhajasha|modhajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhajshësha|modhajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhajrosha|modhajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhajmusha|modhajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhajyasha|modhajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhajnkshësha|gomodhajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhajnkrosha|gomodhajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhajnkmusha|gomodhajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhajnkyasha|gomodhajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modhadhajasha|modhadhajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhadhajshësha|modhadhajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhadhajrosha|modhadhajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhadhajmusha|modhadhajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhadhajyasha|modhadhajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhadhajnkshësha|gomodhadhajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhadhajnkrosha|gomodhadhajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhadhajnkmusha|gomodhadhajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhadhajnkyasha|gomodhadhajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medhæjasha|medhæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medhæjshësha|medhæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medhæjrosha|medhæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medhæjmusha|medhæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medhæjyasha|medhæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedhæjnkshësha|gomedhæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedhæjnkrosha|gomedhæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedhæjnkmusha|gomedhæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedhæjnkyasha|gomedhæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modhfajasha|modhfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhfajshësha|modhfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhfajrosha|modhfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhfajmusha|modhfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhfajyasha|modhfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhfajnkshësha|gomodhfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhfajnkrosha|gomodhfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhfajnkmusha|gomodhfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhfajnkyasha|gomodhfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
